items.text: USED TEXTBOOK SALE — Save 50% on titles for biology, economics, and history. Saturday, April 13, in Lambert Hall, Room 105, from 10 AM to 3 PM. Most paperbacks range from $5 to $12. Cash only. Sale benefits the Student Sustainability Fund.

questions.stem: According to the flyer, what is the price range for most paperbacks?
questions.explanation: The flyer states paperbacks range from $5 to $12.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about how buyers must pay at the sale?

options.A: Only credit cards are accepted at the sale.
options.B: Only checks are accepted at the sale.
options.C: Only digital wallets are accepted at the sale.
options.D: Only cash is accepted at the sale.

questions.explanation: The flyer explicitly notes "Cash only," so only cash payments will be taken.

items.text: Notice: The North Lot will be closed from May 12 through May 16 for repaving. During this period, permit holders may use South Lot B as a designated alternative. Vehicles left in the North Lot after 6 PM on May 11 will be towed.

questions.stem: Where should permit holders park during the closure?
questions.explanation: The notice designates South Lot B as the alternative parking location.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about vehicles not moved by the May 11 deadline?

options.A: Vehicles will receive a written warning.
options.B: Vehicles will be removed by tow services.
options.C: Vehicles will be reparked by maintenance staff.
options.D: Vehicles will be granted a temporary exemption.

questions.explanation: The notice warns that vehicles left in the North Lot after 6 PM on May 11 will be towed.

items.text: Notice: The Carter Library will operate on reduced hours during spring break, March 11 through March 17. The main reading room will be open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 4 PM. Reference services will be closed. Regular hours resume Monday, March 18.

questions.stem: On which days will the main reading room be open during spring break?
questions.explanation: The notice states the main reading room will be open Monday through Friday.

questions.stem: When does the library resume regular hours?
questions.explanation: The notice indicates regular hours resume Monday, March 18.

items.text: Hi Maya, I've confirmed your appointment for a resume review on Wednesday, April 24, at 2:00 PM in Office 312 of Howell Center. There is a $5 materials fee due on arrival. Please bring two printed copies of your current resume. — Sandra, Career Services

questions.stem: Where will the resume review appointment take place?
questions.explanation: The email specifies the appointment is in Office 312 of Howell Center.

questions.stem: How much is the materials fee Maya needs to bring?
questions.explanation: The email states there is a $5 materials fee due on arrival.
